permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: Captures the conversation around you to suggest responses on the glasses display. Audio is streamed to your personal Cloudflare Worker for transcription and never persisted by Cue. Mic is OFF by default and requires explicit per-session opt-in.

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Sends audio + transcript context to the personal Cloudflare Worker (which proxies to Deepgram and OpenAI). Worker URL is configured in phone-side settings; the host below is the deployed cue-worker that the .ehpk is allowed to talk to.
